description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a high, gently curved backrest and a matching ottoman. The upholstery is a solid, warm terracotta color, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The seat and ottoman both rest on sleek, black metal sled legs that provide stability and a touch of industrial style. A single, loose cushion is placed on the seat for added comfort and visual interest. The overall silhouette is clean and streamlined, with no visible armrests and a smooth, unembellished surface. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or stylish outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern terracotta chaise with a high curved backrest, matching ottoman, and black metal sled legs. Features a single loose cushion and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high backrest, seat cushion, and matching ottoman with black sled legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, gently curved backrest and the solid, unadorned upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the seat's contour and ottoman alignment.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the chaise and ottoman, as well as the centered loose cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently curves backward, providing ergonomic support. It is a single, unsegmented piece with a smooth, solid surface and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are black metal sled-style supports, straight and minimalistic, running parallel to the ground for both the chaise and ottoman.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid terracotta color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one loose cushion placed on the seat, matching the chaise's upholstery. The cushion is medium-sized and positioned centrally for lumbar support.
